title: ASCII Mockup Conventions — NXGN Actions Design Documents
purpose: **AI Summary**: Rules for drawing ASCII UI mockups in PRDs, technical designs, and discovery documents. Mockups must reflect actual `@nxgn-solutions/ui` component patterns: `nxgn-grid-page-title` toolbar with Add/Edit/Delete buttons, `nxgn-data-grid` with checkbox multi-select, Bootstrap card sections for form groups, `nxgn-capture-page-title` with Save/Cancel. Embedded lists reuse the same toolbar+grid pattern inside a card. Status and classification columns display the `.name` property of `...

examples.name: Title uses the pattern "Edit {Entity}: {name}" — driven by [newRecord]="false".
When an embedded list has domain-specific toolbar buttons beyond CRUD
Some embedded lists only support removal — no Add/Edit
- Delete button uses danger variant styling

sections.title: Visual Vocabulary
content: Every UI element in a mockup maps to a specific component or pattern. Agents and reviewers MUST use these symbols consistently.
| `[Custom Button]` | Domain command button | `custom-buttons` content projection slot |
| `☑` | Selected row | Selected row in grid |
| `[▼ dropdown ]` | Select dropdown | `nxgn-dropdown-field` with `[items]` of `EnumDTO[]` or `NamedDTO[]` |
| `⚠ message` | Inline validation error | `[errors]` array on field component |
| `(n)` in header | Badge count | `<span class="badge bg-secondary">` |

sections.title: List Page
content: - **Toolbar** (`nxgn-grid-page-title`): Title on left, action buttons on right
- **Grid** (`nxgn-data-grid`): Checkbox column, data columns, built-in search, footer count
- Double-click row navigates to capture page (not shown in mockup, documented in behavior)
When the toolbar includes domain-specific actions beyond CRUD, show them via the `custom-buttons` slot:
- Domain command buttons (`[Approve]`, `[Disable]`) appear left of CRUD buttons
- All buttons auto-disable when no rows selected (built into `nxgn-grid-page-title`)
│  │          Create an action to get started.           │   │
- Edit/Delete hidden when no items — built into `nxgn-grid-page-title` via `[selectedItems]`

sections.title: Capture Page
content: Title uses the pattern "New {Entity}" — driven by `nxgn-capture-page-title` with `[newRecord]="true"` and `addPrefix="New"`.
- **Embedded lists**: Full `nxgn-grid-page-title` + `nxgn-data-grid` inside a card — same pattern as standalone list pages
Title uses the pattern "Edit {Entity}: {name}" — driven by `[newRecord]="false"`.
- **Edit title**: "Edit {Entity}: {name}" — shows the entity name for context
- **Dropdown fields**: `[▼ value ]` notation for `nxgn-dropdown-field` bound to `EnumDTO[]`
- **Domain command buttons**: `[Deactivate]`, `[Rotate Secret]` in `custom-buttons` slot — only visible in edit mode via `[showActions]="isEditMode()"`
- **Read-only sections**: Card with badge count in header `(3)` — shown only in edit mode via `@if (isEditMode())`
When an embedded list has domain-specific toolbar buttons beyond CRUD:
- Domain command buttons in `custom-buttons` slot, left of CRUD buttons
Some embedded lists only support removal — no Add/Edit:
- Only `[Remove]` — no Add/Edit (steps managed via separate provisioning flow)
- Double-click navigates to a different feature (Users), not a child route

sections.title: Validation Error State
content: │  │                 ⚠ Must start with a lowercase letter;    │   │
- `⚠` inline error below the field — from `computed()` error arrays
- Multiple errors can appear per field
- Save remains disabled until all errors clear (`isFormValid()` computed)

sections.title: Duplicate Detection Error
content: │  │                 ⚠ This name is already in use.           │   │
│  │                 ⚠ This slug is already in use.           │   │
- Unique values loaded from server, checked client-side

sections.title: Server Error State
content: - Alert banner for server errors — `<div class="alert alert-danger">`
- Appears between toolbar and form sections
- Save button re-enables after error (user can retry)

sections.title: Confirmation Dialog
content: - `ConfirmationDialogService.confirmDelete(title, message)` — always shown before destructive actions
- Centered modal with static backdrop (prevent accidental dismissal)
- Delete button uses danger variant styling
- Confirm button label matches the action verb

sections.title: Child Route Capture
content: When an embedded list's Add/Edit navigates to a child route (e.g., `/actions/:id/evidence/new`), the child capture replaces the parent content visually:
│  │                 ⚠ This Evidence ID is already in use.      │   │
- Parent content CSS-hidden (`d-none`), not destroyed — state service survives
- Dropdown fields bound to `EnumDTO[]` lookup data from parent state
- Duplicate detection against sibling items in parent state

sections.title: Rules
content: | **Toolbar, not inline buttons** | Actions in `nxgn-grid-page-title` / `nxgn-capture-page-title`, never per-row |
| **Checkbox selection** | `☐` / `☑` column for multi-select, not row highlighting |
| **Search in grid** | Built-in `Search: [___]` row in `nxgn-data-grid`, not a custom search box |
| **Card sections** | Form groups in Bootstrap `.card` with `.card-header` label |
| **Embedded lists** | Child grids use the same toolbar+grid pattern, nested inside a card |
| **Empty states** | Grid shows centered message; Edit/Delete buttons hidden automatically |
| **Read-only sections** | Card with badge count `(n)` in header; shown only in edit mode |
| **Inline validation** | `⚠` below the field — from `computed()` error arrays |
| **Duplicate detection** | `⚠ This {field} is already in use.` — client-side check against loaded values |
| **Server errors** | Alert banner between toolbar and form content |
| **Save disabled** | `[Save ◌]` when form invalid or saving in progress |
| **Confirmation required** | Modal dialog before every destructive action (delete, deactivate, revoke) |
| **Success feedback** | `ToastrService` notification (not shown in mockups — it's a toast overlay) |
✓ CORRECT — toolbar with actions, domain commands in custom-buttons slot
✗ WRONG — row highlighting or radio buttons
✓ CORRECT — embedded list uses full toolbar+grid pattern
✗ WRONG — embedded list without toolbar (bare table)
✓ CORRECT — card section with header label
✗ WRONG — form fields without card wrapper

- [Embedded List](embedded-list.md) — Child grid pattern within capture pages
